## App Submission

### App Info

- **App name:**
- **Your GitHub username:**
- **App slug:** (matches your folder name: `apps/<username>/<slug>/`)
- **Builder / tool used:**
- **Model used:**
- **Time to first working version:** minutes
- **Category:**
- **Source URL (if public):**

### Checklist

- [ ] My app is a **static HTML/CSS/JS** webapp — no server-side code required.
- [ ] My app **may call external APIs from the browser** — I listed all external domains in `manifest.json` under `externalApiDomains`.
- [ ] I included `manifest.json` with all required fields.
- [ ] I included `prompt.md` with the exact original prompt I used.
- [ ] I included `index.html` as the demo entry point.
- [ ] I included at least **2 screenshots** (`screenshots/thumbnail.png` + one desktop shot).
- [ ] I disclosed my manual edits honestly in `manualEditLevel` and `outcome.manualEdits`.
- [ ] I selected a license and set `source.license` in the manifest.
- [ ] I set `permissions.permissionToFeature: true` — I give 1PromptApps permission to showcase this app.
- [ ] I set `permissions.rightsAttested: true` — I have the rights to share this work.
- [ ] This submission contains **no secrets, private keys, or credentials**.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally and the check passed.

### Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: unusual approach, known limitations, context about the prompt, etc. -->
